programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: War hero Col. McNamara is imprisoned in a German POW camp. As the camp's highest-ranking American officer, he commands his fellow inmates. Never giving up the fight to win the war, McNamara is planning, waiting for his moment to strike back at the enemy.

programme.title: Lessons in Love
programme.desc: A drama about a Cambridge poetry professor who begins to re-evaluate his life of Byronic excess.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The Great American Card Game steams up the Mississippi as the World Poker Tour makes land for the Jack Binion World Poker Open.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's poker heaven in the City of Angels when the Commerce Casino serves up a nearly $4,000,000 prize pool in this L.A. Poker Classic.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's high stakes poker in paradise. WPT brings you final table action from Aruba at the UltimateBet Ultimate Poker Classic.
The classic George Orwell story set in a world where absolute conformity in action, word and thought, including loyalty to Big Brother, is demanded.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: Annie Hall
programme.desc: Woody Allen is in prime form in this celebrated comedy and 1977 Best Picture Oscar®-winner in which he portrays a highly neurotic comedy writer who falls head-over-heels in love with a naive small-town girl (Diane Keaton) who aspires to be a singer.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Ambushed
programme.desc: An agent (Dolph Lundgren) faces killers and crooked cops as he tries to rescue an undercover colleague (Carly Pope) from cocaine smugglers.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: No Way Home
programme.desc: A paroled murderer returns to the Staten Island home of his youth, where a poignant friendship blossoms with the restrained wife of his temperamental-- and jealous-- brother.

programme.title: Wicked Ways
programme.desc: A wife, her two-timing husband and a flirting neighbor are unpredictable competitors in a warped game that turns into a life-or-death affair.

programme.title: The Dangerous Sex Date
programme.desc: Shy librarian Xenia experiences a night of extreme sex with Ghost. In the morning, he is found dead with his throat slit. Xenia flees without leaving a trace. But Ghost's friend, Silver, discovers that the man was investigating the SexServices website.

programme.title: Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: A group of friends on a weekend trip to a cabin in the woods find themselves terrorized by alien visitors. Starring: Brittany Allen, Freddie Stroma, Jesse Moss

programme.title: InControl
programme.desc: A group of students discover a device that allows them to control and experience the world through someone else’s eyes. As they push the machine to its limits, they realise they have been manipulated and descend into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Darkside
programme.desc: It is the last, great war. Out of the wreckage of a troop transport, five soldiers find themselves stranded on the dark side of the moon. Cut off and behind enemy lines, they start a dangerous journey back to their home territory.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Vietnam
programme.desc: We are in the Quan Hoa mountains in the Northwest of Vietnam. It is one of the poorest and most isolated regions in the country.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Cameroon
programme.desc: The bravest drivers in Cameroon are named the “Clandos”; the name comes from the word clandestine or illegal.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: China's Dragon Road
programme.desc: In the south of China, in the Guizhou province, mountains cover 90% of the land. Within these mountains, two of the region's most vital and abundant resources are found.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Katanga
programme.desc: In Katanga, many people are waiting for a train named after a bird, the “Swallow”. More than 2,000 people, three times the train’s capacity, are squeezing in the carriages.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Apparition
programme.desc: A group of millennials are led by a murderous App to a historic Young Offenders facility, soon to discover the ominous reasons for their visit.

programme.title: Magic Magic
programme.desc: Alicia arrives in South America to vacation with her cousin, Sara. When Sarah is suddenly called away, Alicia is stuck on a remote island off Chile with three of Sara's friends, including Brink, an American exchange student with a sadistic streak.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident, Anna (Christina Ricci) wakes up to find the funeral director (Liam Neeson) preparing her body for her funeral.

programme.title: FIFA Confederations Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between the USA and Brazil played at Ellis Park Stadium.

programme.title: Unforgettable FIFA World Cup Blowouts
programme.desc: Relive Portugal's victory against North Korea in England 1966™ and the Netherlands' win over Argentina in Germany 1974™.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: One final, three goals... discover how Carli Lloyd achieved football immortality.

programme.title: FIFA Confederations Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Brazil and Spain played at Estadio do Maracanã.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: Sam Kerr's journey has been an incredible one.

programme.title: FIFA Confederations Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: Legionnaire's Trail
programme.desc: A half-Roman soldier must cross deadly terrain to save two legions who are trapped behind enemy lines.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: After the fall of Rome, its last emperor (Thomas Sangster), a 12-year-old boy, journeys to Britannia with his closest retainers (Colin Firth, Ben Kingsley) to find a fabled legion.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: After the fall of Rome, its last emperor (Thomas Sangster), a 12-year-old boy, journeys to Britannia with his closest retainers (Colin Firth, Ben Kingsley) to find a fabled legion.

programme.title: Pompeii
programme.desc: As Mount Vesuvius rains down lava and ash, a gladiator (Kit Harington) races to save the woman (Emily Browning) he loves before the city collapses.

programme.title: Curse of The Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts looks at one of the most cursed periods in European history: the Middle Ages. Archaeologists reveal how wars, pandemics, and cataclysmic floods toppled the world of our ancestors. So how did Western society survive?

programme.title: Curse of The Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts charts the rise of civilisation from 6100BCE to the end of the Bronze Age. A time of great architecture, literature and the arts, most of these great civilisations suddenly collapsed, plunging the world into a dark age

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 1
programme.desc: Join a voyage to Farne Islands, home to seals and seabirds, early Christian communities and one of the first landing sites for the terrifying Viking raiders.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 2
programme.desc: Starting on the Isle of Lewis in the Outer Hebrides, witness the 5,000-year-old standing stones of Callanish, traditional Scottish blackhouses, and cut peat with a modern crofter.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Staffordshire, England, where the onset of a violent storm announced the discovery of the largest Anglo-Saxon hoard ever uncovered. But was the storm an omen of things to come?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the Hell Creek Formation of South Dakota, with one of the greatest palaeontology discoveries ever made. However, the find brought nothing but trouble and suspicion to those who uncovered it.

programme.title: Sexual Malice
programme.desc: A woman's stormy extramarital affair with a male stripper ensnares her in a web of murder and deceit.

programme.title: The Pink House
programme.desc: Marcello, a dwarf hidden away by his family, falls in love with a prostitute from a brothel. Her lover plots to kill him, but the prostitute helps him escape, sacrificing her own well-being.

programme.title: Blue Hour
programme.desc: The Blue Hour tells the story of Tanya, a young woman with a mysterious past, who finds herself trapped in a sexual hell in Los Angeles. Punctuated by striking visuals, The Blue Hour is a lost masterpiece of late period sexploitation.

programme.title: Come Play with Me
programme.desc: A health-resort where both the clients and the employees easily take their clothes off and have a little fun is the setting of this sex-comedy. Starring: Irene Handl, Alfie Bass. Guinness Book Of World Records lists it's 210 week cinematic run

programme.desc: Cagney witnesses a stabbing and apprehends a vicious criminal. But when the victim is found murdered, she becomes the only witness to hold the killer responsible. The killer, who has a history of making people disappear, begins to stalk Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Who Said It's Fair? (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey search for a young boy whose mother fears is missing. The detectives, however, suspect the child is working as a runner for a drug dealer. Lacey is reluctant to go to the doctor after she fears she might have breast cancer.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Who Said It's Fair? (Part 2)
programme.desc: After finally visiting the doctors, Lacey receives the news that she must have a mastectomy, forcing her to face her own mortality and what that could mean for her family. Meanwhile, members of the 14th precinct are preparing for the Sergeant's exam.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lost And Found
programme.desc: While Lacey recovers from her surgery, she realizes that there may be more to life and wonders if she should retire from the police force. Meanwhile, Cagney is upset when her yellow Corvette is stolen with a piece of graffiti as the clue.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed

programme.title: Very Bad Men: An Eye For An Eye
programme.desc: A serial killer with a depraved obsession targets Texan prostitutes and surgically removes their eyeballs..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The High Rolling Reverend
programme.desc: A charismatic Reverend shears more than nine million dollars from his flock of 1,600 churches.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Corridor Killer

programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Amnesiac
programme.desc: As a doctor with a startling new treatment for amnesia, Jim Phelps forces Paris to relive another man's past when the IMF pushes a search for stolen nuclear material on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Manling Tsang and Neal Williams were youngsters who fell into marriage in a hurry. Neither was well prepared for parenthood or the responsibilities of adult life. Manling planned to rid herself of her young family in a scheme of breathtaking cruelty.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Alice Farquharson was the centre of her family. Her husband Keith was a police officer with a chequered history of misogyny and extramarital affairs. When Alice unexpectedly died, her family and police were shocked to discover the cause.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, Assia Newton had it all. But she lived in fear of her violent and controlling husband, Kelvin. When Assia finally escaped, she dreamt of a new life. But Kelvin still ruled her life… and he would end it

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Mahmuda Khatun
programme.desc: Amin Miah wanted a devout, homely wife to start a family with. Mahmuda Khatun wanted a career, a social life - and her family off her back. Their differences were irreconcilable, and one of them would choose the violent way out.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: When the body of 22 year old Misty Morse is found floating in the Indian River, police suspect one of her many boyfriends.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 094

programme.desc: With the family split having become permanent, Rocket Dog's Whiskers loses Zaphod and a large group of males.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Evicted Sencha is thrown a lifeline in the form of attractive rover Lilac.

programme.title: Wild Asia: In The Realm Of The Red Ape
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are one of the oldest habitats on the face of our earth – older than many of the stars.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Three's Company
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Strip Search
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in. It's a tough job but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secret Places
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Rider
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Midnight Run
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Hunt for Santa
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag
programme.desc: After Si has started moonlighting as a grocery bagger, the guys show up at the store and their teasing inadvertently causes Si to lose his job and his chance to enter a local bagging competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Correspondent
programme.desc: A war correspondent finds himself imprisoned and facing execution. Meanwhile, Jonathan and Mark show him what's he's missed during his life by putting work ahead of family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Aloha
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a teenage cancer patient named Lee who wants to save the dolphins.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lee's cancer is now in remission. She gets back to work on her save-the-dolphins campaign.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Heaven Nose, Mister Smith
programme.desc: Jonathan must stop an angel who's back on Earth with the intention of breaking up his son's marriage.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Time Travel
programme.desc: Evidence suggests that time travel may have occurred in the past.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Alien Attack
programme.desc: Secret satellites. Death stars. The weaponisation of outer space. Are governments the world over preparing for an alien attack? And if so, why are we being kept in the dark?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Doomsday
programme.desc: There have been doomsday signs and prophecies for centuries, and humans' time on this planet may be nearly over.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: New World Order
programme.desc: An elite group of power-brokers may be trying to rule the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Cloning
programme.desc: Disturbing experiments in animal cloning go on behind closed doors and human cloning may soon be a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Discover America's new killer aircraft and the out-of-this-world technology the US military uses to conquer the globe.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Mind Control
programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Haarp
programme.desc: Governments around the world may be using weather control to incite the next World War and possibly destroy the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Warning
programme.desc: Caress discovers Emily and Ben's secret and Blake is double-crossed by an old friend. Alexis schemes to turn the Chinese government against Blake; Claudia threatens to reveal Adam's power of attorney over Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Cry
programme.desc: Blake is tricked into borrowing money from Alexis; Jackie returns home to some shocking news; Blake learns the identity of the woman who can save his reputation; ignored by family and taunted by a reporter, Amanda attempts suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rescue
programme.desc: The guilt-ridden Alexis fears she is too late when she finds Amanda unconscious; Dominique proposes to Garrett; Steven believes he may lose Danny to Sammy Jo and Clay; Ben makes special plans for Caress and Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Triple-Cross
programme.desc: Successfully proving Blake and Alexis dishonorable, Ben is given control of the South China Sea leases; Steven attempts to uncover Adam's secret; Dominique's wedding day approaches; Sammy Jo and Clay find romance by candlelight.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Vince can't seem to escape his online-ex, Alyssa, whose stalking has caused his real life girlfriend, Liz, to break up with him. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa so he can try to salvage a future with Liz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Former model Jayme has learned that her online boyfriend is not only fake, but appears to be catfishing other women too! Nev and Max help find the catfish to put an end to his deception. (S5, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After being Catfished by her high school best friend, Larissa turned to her online friend Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew to love but after a few false moves on Anthony's part Larissa is worried he too is lying.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Catfish is going international with a trip to the UK! Nev and Max meet Spencer who's been holding on to a secret for six years: he's in a relationship with a global pop star! (S5, ep15)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After months of intimate texts with Titus, a man she met online, Candice has decided to tell to her husband. But before she does, she asks Nev to help her find out who Titus really is! (S5, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Fans of popular YouTube star Andrea Russett call on Nev and Max to help catch a potential stalker who is impersonating Andrea's family online. What the guys uncover will shock even them. (S5, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom

programme.desc: Derek has three scooters to collect, while also finding room for a Daimler and a teardrop caravan.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of Swedish models, which include a Saab 96L, and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.desc: A collection of Austin Mini Metros arrive for auction. Also going under the hammer is a baby Fiat 850 Coupe, and a haulier offloads part of his vintage commercial vehicles collection.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A girl suffers life-threatening breathing difficulties at school, an elderly lady is struggling with an infection and a young father experiences worrying chest pains.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A teenager is in excruciating pain after falling and injuring his leg. Elsewhere, the paramedics treat a 94-year-old man showing signs of a stroke and another man with severe stomach pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A young girl is reluctant to let the paramedics examine her injured head and a mature student needs medical help.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: John and Shay share their struggles with having a blended family. Barbara does the best she can in raising her 16-year-old niece, Ayonna, who is making bad choices.

programme.title: NEW Karamo

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Isiah and girlfriend Marilyn argue about her flirtatious ways; Carl says Barbara's behavior is fishy, and the evidence suggests something is happening.

programme.desc: Jane claims her ex-husband of 25 years owes her over $3,000 for their son's wedding.

programme.desc: David is suing John after he was unable to get the car registered because he claims the title wasn't notarized.

programme.desc: Keisha is suing her brother's girlfriend for the cost to fix her car after she damaged it during an altercation.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!

programme.desc: In the oriental city of Sayonara, Mario, Toad, Princess Toadstool and Luigi, who is pulling the cart Mario, Toad and Princess Toadstool are riding, are searching for a weapon that can help them defeat King Koopa, Super Sushi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: War hero Col. McNamara is imprisoned in a German POW camp. As the camp's highest-ranking American officer, he commands his fellow inmates. Never giving up the fight to win the war, McNamara is planning, waiting for his moment to strike back at the enemy.

programme.title: Lessons in Love
programme.desc: A drama about a Cambridge poetry professor who begins to re-evaluate his life of Byronic excess.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's high stakes poker in paradise. WPT brings you final table action from Aruba at the UltimateBet Ultimate Poker Classic.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour visits the Caribbean for the PokerStars Caribbean Adventure.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Let the battle begin as all the winners from the inaugural season of the WPT gather in Las Vegas for the first ever World Poker Tour Battle of Champions.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: You're invited to the most exclusive event in poker as one hundred and ninety-two famous faces square off at the Commerce Casino in Los Angeles for the raucous fun of the WPT Invitational.

programme.title: Annie Hall
programme.desc: Woody Allen is in prime form in this celebrated comedy and 1977 Best Picture Oscar®-winner in which he portrays a highly neurotic comedy writer who falls head-over-heels in love with a naive small-town girl (Diane Keaton) who aspires to be a singer.

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A cheerleading-obsessed teenager is sent to a strict summer camp when her parents suspect her of being a lesbian.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Curse of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau is missing and the Pink Panther (David Niven) is hot on his trail in this wildly funny laugh-fest that offers plenty of slapstick humor and a myriad of stars including Joanna Lumley, Herbert Lom and Robert Wagner.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: The Dangerous Sex Date
programme.desc: Shy librarian Xenia experiences a night of extreme sex with Ghost. In the morning, he is found dead with his throat slit. Xenia flees without leaving a trace. But Ghost's friend, Silver, discovers that the man was investigating the SexServices website.

programme.title: Criminal Law
programme.desc: Attorney Oldman successfully defends accused killer Kevin Bacon. It is only after proving his client's innocence by discrediting eyewitness, that Oldman discovers Bacon is guilty--and intends to kill again.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Darkside
programme.desc: It is the last, great war. Out of the wreckage of a troop transport, five soldiers find themselves stranded on the dark side of the moon. Cut off and behind enemy lines, they start a dangerous journey back to their home territory.

programme.title: Target Earth
programme.desc: When aliens have infiltrated society by inhabiting bodies of select human beings, they plan a full-scale invasion of Earth. A detective finds the information that can stop the attack; however the information is in the mind of a six-year-old child.

programme.title: The Four Warriors
programme.desc: Travelling home, four soldiers discover a village gripped by fear, as residents are abducted by unknown predators. These warriors set out to rescue them and destroy what lurks outside the village.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Living the Dream

programme.title: Timber Kings: Night Sweats
programme.desc: Beat battles a stuck truck in the middle of the night, then builds in darkness to meet his deadline on a home in northern Ontario.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident, Anna (Christina Ricci) wakes up to find the funeral director (Liam Neeson) preparing her body for her funeral.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Bank Raid
programme.desc: Kidnappers abduct Peter's niece and hold her ransom for $50,000. To get her back safely, Dr. Brady is forced to steal the money from a bank vault.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Strange Partners
programme.desc: A wealthy man uses extortion and a trained attack dog to force Peter to kill his partner and make it look like a heart attack.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Odds Against Death
programme.desc: A gangster forces one of Peter's staff to developed a mathematical system to win at the roulette table.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Muckraking TV journalist Donald Rivers (Alan Thicke), host of The Whole Truth, has the show of a lifetime: rock solid-proof that the government and private defense contractors have been engaging in secret genetic cloning.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Using an experimental treatment, a scientist (Pat Morita) helps an aging athlete (Adrian Pasdar) end his career on a high note by accelerating his reflexes for one last match. But with victory comes side-effects...courtesy of The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society controlled by aliens, a mother rebels when she is forced to give up her child to Mother, a wise alien who acts as a parent to all infants. Determined to get the child back, she embarks upon a dangerous quest that will change her world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Two brothers wrestle for control of their father's million-dollar pharmaceutical company. But when one brother discovers a drug which may hold the secret to eternal life, the battle for control becomes a rapid trip toward self-destruction.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A dying race of aliens come to Earth to stop its own extinction…by reanimating human corpses. But a government doctor (Mykelti Williamson) senses that there may be more to their plans than mere survival! D. W. Moffett and Rae Dawn Chong also star.

programme.desc: Joel's visiting parents adapt easily to Cicely; Holling's disdain for sports causes Shelly concern over their baby's athletic future.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.desc: McGarrett finds himself in Hong Kong, half-drowned, half-drugged, with amnesia, as he once again pursues his perennial antagonist, Wo Fat, now the key figure in the theft of some deadly nerve gas.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is called in to test the unique security system of a top-secret research and development lab. The system, which is designed to entrap and exterminate intruders, malfunctions, trapping its creator, Jill Ludlum, and MacGyver inside.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels must prevent a talented young boxer from using his boxing skills against his enemies

programme.desc: The angels intercede when a mother’s blind love for her reckless son puts her life in grave danger

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Sanctuary: Homecoming

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise

programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: With the clock ticking Peter Jackson has to find a studio to save his work in progress. Only one studio is willing to take the gamble on three films made at once adapting an unwanted property led by an unproven director on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: After a successful teaser at Cannes, the team races to complete the first film on time. Meanwhile filming begins to take a toll on the cast and crew. As injuries pile up, the most demanding scene in the trilogy nearly breaks them.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Antianeirai

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: After eating strange mushrooms, the pilgrims lose their memories. Monkey joins bandits who mistake him for a banished prince of fungus.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the Land of Search for Understanding, the king tests every traveler’s wisdom. Monkey learns that true knowledge lies in compassion, not intellect.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: When the pilgrims bathe in a mysterious pool, they turn into babies. Tripitaka learns it’s the Fountain of Youth, guarded by the Spirits of Time Passed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Starving and lost, the pilgrims find a quiet town with hidden dangers. They learn that not all demons are enemies, nor all humans pure.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Chen-Gold, the richest man alive, seeks a husband for his daughter while greed consumes him. Obsessed with wealth, he turns himself to gold.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter officer (David Carradine) is accused of killing the mobster who murdered his partner; guest Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside goes to Tokyo to protect a Japanese officer (James Shigeta) who befriended him near the end of World War II.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The mob orders a woman (Suzanne Pleshette) to set Ironside up for murder, but she can't go through with it.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An ex-vaudevillian and reformed bank robber (Burgess Meredith) fumes when someone imitates his style; guest Susan Seaforth.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The proprietor (Pat Hingle) of a halfway house for reformed criminals steals from rich gangsters and gives the money to his charges.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lost And Found
programme.desc: While Lacey recovers from her surgery, she realizes that there may be more to life and wonders if she should retire from the police force. Meanwhile, Cagney is upset when her yellow Corvette is stolen with a piece of graffiti as the clue.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Two Grand
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go up against master jewel thief Albert Grand (guest star Ferdinand Mayne) once again when he suddenly resurfaces. Cagney is determined not to let him slip through her fingers this time.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Con Games
programme.desc: Cagney's character and professionalism comes under attack as her sexual harassment charges against Capt. Hennessey go to trial. She decides to stand on her own feet as she ignores advice and threats. Meanwhile, Lacey investigates a fraud case.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Violations
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are tasked with investigating the disappearance of a high-school kid. They uncover that he was accidentally sent to a violent prison for shoplifting. While there, he was attacked and raped, resulting in a lawsuit from his parents.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Organized Crime
programme.desc: When Cagney and Lacey investigate the brutal murder of a nun, they discover that the nun was the goddaughter of a local mobster. The mobster offers to conduct the investigation within his organization. Meanwhile, Cagney gets promoted to Sergeant.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: On The Street
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate the beating of a teenage runaway who has shunned her family's wealth and instead has been living and working on the streets as a hooker. The detectives must try and convince her to help convict her pimp.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A friendly priest is dubbed “Father Feeler” by dozens of young girls, and is finally brought to justice by the women who could not forget their past

programme.title: Very Bad Men: To Kill And Kill Again
programme.desc: In March 1995, one nurse notices the average number of deaths at her Clinton, Indiana hospital has quadrupled over a two-year period. Soon, a male nurse with a sweet bedside manner becomes the centre of an intense police investigation

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Death And Dismemberment
programme.desc: A woman makes a horrifying discovery of human remains in the driveway of a suburban Hamilton, ON home. When the homeowner is arrested, he refuses to talk but what police uncover will expose a dark history of violence and murder..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Bayou Strangler
programme.desc: A predator lurks in the hot summer of 2005, preying on the vulnerable young men of Louisiana's streets. The sexually sadistic serial killer lures his victims with a cunning rouse, leaving a trail of bodies in his wake

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Bachelor Number One
programme.desc: A handsome serial killer becomes infamous when he is chosen as the successful dating contestant on a popular game show

programme.title: Very Bad Men: A Wolf Among Sheep
programme.desc: A popular teen girl disappears into thin air in Elkhart, Indiana. But when her naked body is discovered a week later, police must find her killer before fear rips the quiet community apart

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Mystery of Disembodied Feet
programme.desc: The summer of 2007, a young girl walks on the beach and a human foot in a sneaker. Less than a week later, a couple discovers another running shoe with a foot inside of it south of there. Thus begins the mystery of the disembodied feet.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer
programme.desc: Two girls are attacked by a man armed with a baseball bat. One of them manages to escape but the second one is found in a salmon river. The killer nags the police for months until he leaves behind a telling clue.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Call Waiting
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Kid Stuff
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Does It
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Back in the Hood
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Road
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived. The only question is, whom?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: True Identity
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration

programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Lady Killer

programme.title: Murder Maps: Notting Hill Horror Part 1

programme.desc: John Christie brought death to everyone around him. He managed to pin his terrible crimes on another man who would be sentenced to death. He eluded capture for years.

programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.desc: The origins of weather; seasons allow life to form; Jem checks out wave power in Scotland.

programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.desc: The science of genetic modification in Hawaii; shattering a glass; curing a dust allergy through eating worms.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Baxter, Cat Saver/Play It Again, D.W.
programme.desc: A cat gets stuck in a tree and Buster Baxter saves the day! Risking life and limb! Next, the ridiculous Crazy Bus song is EVERYWHERE, but mostly it's in the Read's home, because D.W. has to play it 4000 times a day.

programme.title: Arthur: Just Desserts/The Big Dig
programme.desc: Arthur has a hard time resisting sweets, and one evening his overindulgence wins him an upset stomach and some 'Grimm' dreams. Arthur and D.W. loved it when Grandpa Dave came to visit--but now he only wants to sleep and play checkers.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Eyes/Francine's Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: For some reason, Arthur isn't doing very well in school anymore. Maybe he just needs some glasses? Problem is, Arthur hates having to wear them. And it's school picture day and Muffy is determined that Francine will look her best.

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur: Fountain Abbey/Arthur Calls It
programme.desc: Muffy's devastated when she learns her great, great grandmother Mary Alice wasn't royalty, but a common maid. Pressure from his classmates has Arthur doubting his decision to call Buster out during a baseball game.

programme.title: Arthur: 1001 Dads/Prunella's Prediction
programme.desc: When Buster insists that he will miss the Father's Day picnic because he has other plans, Arthur is convinced that he's really sad and embarrassed about his parents’ divorce. And Prunella predicts a gift of flashpants, the hot new fashion.

programme.title: Arthur: Maria Speaks/Postcards from Binky
programme.desc: Maria has always been a silent fixture in Mr. Ratburn's third-grade class. But her time to speak has finally come. Can she fix her stutter? When Binky's grandparents miss his big soccer game, he decides to film a video reenactment.

programme.title: Arthur: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In
programme.desc: Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: Math, schmath. That's what Sue Ellen thinks… until she runs into a problem her artistic vision can't solve. Sue Ellen can't wait to meet her pen pal in person.

programme.title: Stories from the Blitz
programme.desc: Stories from the Blitz features new interviews with those who were there and amazing archive footage of the devastation, and of human courage and sheer will to survive one of Britain's darkest periods in History.

programme.title: Boy Soldiers Of World War II
programme.desc: In Britain during World War Two, thousands of men over the age of 18 were conscripted into the army, but among them were hundreds of underage boys, some as young as 15, who lied about their age so that they could join up.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: The Legacy
programme.desc: Experience this groundbreaking film, the story of the greatest sea disaster in U.S. Navy History, told for the first time by only the men who lived it.

programme.title: Field of Valor

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Cambodian Civil War

programme.desc: 1942 and Hitler has the totally barking idea of using educated dogs to do a soldier's job. The Nazi leader wants to create fearsome canines to help him win the Second World War

programme.title: The Jewish Nazi?
programme.desc: The courageous story of a Jewish child who survived the Holocaust as the Nazi's youngest soldier, hiding his secret for years before finally discovering his true identity.

programme.desc: The Gods of War: The industrial revolution changed it all when it came to cannons as they evolved from wholly inaccurate and immobile to deadly killing machines.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The slain member of a famous string quartet recorded a prediction of his death months earlier; guest Tim Matheson.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.desc: Celeste Beard claims she is innocent of the murder of her husband Steven Beard, co-founder of an Austin television station. After a life of abuse and depression, Celeste married Beard. In October 1999, Beard was fatally shot while lying in bed.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent Gilmer was described as a kind man before he shockingly murdered his father. But why did his behavior change?

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis

programme.desc: Track star Emily experiences intense stomach pain initially diagnosed as IBS. A seemingly innocent mark on her Carrie's big toe is initially dismissed by a dermatologist.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly despairs about dating again, the guys secretly create an online dating profile for her and discover what dating is like from a woman's perspective.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Laila Rezk was discovered badly beaten in her own home, she died despite all efforts to revive her. Forensic examination eliminated all traces of fingerprints, except one.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Glenn Rycroft – The Cancer Con Artist
programme.desc: The former air steward who faked cancer and raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from his local community.

programme.desc: A woman is told by a friend that she was a passenger in a car where she was confronted with a guy's head in a bucket.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy

programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
programme.desc: Russell wants to put his family back together after his three children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year-old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiancé Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed Five Times?
programme.desc: Michelle's current boyfriend Everett can't run from Robert's allegations about his daughter. Will Everett's lie detector test results prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Impromptu Performance

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Neurotic Detective

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a missing boy that vanishes on a train after he and his father have a fight.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's famous detective faces the ultimate challenge when enormous monsters attack London.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Terror By Night

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay brings in helping hands to staff the dinner service in the final challenge; tempers flare between competitors; the winner becomes the new head chef of one of Ramsay's Las Vegas restaurants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Sixteen chefs compete in rigorous culinary challenges under the exacting eye of chef Gordon Ramsay, hoping to win a position at a restaurant in Atlantic City, N.J.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the teams face another gruelling challenge; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants go to a meat locker to learn about cuts of beef. The teams race to impress chef Ramsay when they are asked to put their newfound knowledge to the test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 13 remaining chefs compete in two teams to feed 50 hungry kids from a football and cheerleading program. The losing team will have to clean the kitchens and finish prep work for the service challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay asks the chefs to create three Asian-fusion dishes using poultry, seafood and beef. Both teams crack under pressure when they go head-to-head during the dinner service.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Gitano
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Terror
