programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Timothy Peart’s Last Dance

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice
programme.desc: A couple's daily walk ends in murder and a cloud of suspicion descends on the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: When a young teacher fails to show up for work, her principal goes looking for her at her home, where he makes a shocking discovery. The case would go cold until DNA technology helps police track down her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Desperate Cry
programme.desc: A mother's desperate cry for help alerts neighbors and leads to a terrifying discovery.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1

programme.title: On the Case: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: John Greathouse finds his stepdaughter, Kelli Bailey, murdered in her bedroom; investigators find a video tape and a dead man's forged check and hope these clues will be the keys to bringing Bailey's cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a bomb kills a young paraplegic mother, authorities must determine if it was sent by a drug dealer seeking revenge or someone much closer to the victim

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a retired pro-wrestler is brutally murdered in the Manitoba hamlet of Inwood, police coordinate a massive sting operation that brings to light a savage small-town conspiracy.

programme.desc: A report on new details into the search for Natalee Holloway, a U.S. teenager who disappeared on May 30, 2005 during a post-graduation trip in the Caribbean island of Aruba.

programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman discovers the bludgeoned body of her nephew, investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise. With three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators expose the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father in a headline-making case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Lois Riess
programme.desc: Lois and David Riess were grandparents and business owners. Lois was also a gambling addict who would do anything to feed her habit. David became the first victim of a murderous rampage that earned Lois the title of America’s most wanted grandmother.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Keland Hill
programme.desc: Tiffany and Keland Hill were military veterans with a shining service history. But while Tiffany still lived to serve, Keland lived to control, stalk and terrorise his wife. He was extremely violent, but no one predicted his final act of brutality.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Monster of Miramichi

programme.desc: A trucker at a roadside rest station discovers the fully clothed body of a dead East Indian woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Special Delivery
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surface Scratches
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries related to ancient texts including the Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Torah, the Secrets of Fulcanelli, the Tao Te Ching, the Vedas.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson: Canterbury Cathedral

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: Tower Bridge

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Punjab, India

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Crunch Cereal Contest/D.W. Flips
programme.desc: A year's supply of Crunch Cereal is in store for the person who can write the new Crunch Cereal jingle, and Arthur is sure he can do it. Next, how hard can it be to do a cartwheel on a balance beam? D.W. is about to find out.

programme.title: Arthur: Flippity Francine/Muffy Takes the Wheel
programme.desc: When Muffy posts a goofy video of Francine on the Muffington Post, Francine worries she will become the laughing stock of the entire school. And it's the 1st Annual Lakewood Derby and Muffy's revved up!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Split Decision/Muffy Goes Metropolitan
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: Best Wishes/The Tardy Tumbler
programme.desc: After George has a lucky streak, his friends pressure him to wish for a snow day. Can George deliver? Prunella's excited about making the gymnastics team, until she realizes practice starts at 6am! Will she practice or snooze?

programme.title: Arthur: Locked In The Library!/Arthur Accused!
programme.desc: Arthur and Francine are fighting. But when they get locked inside the library they either have to make up or prepare for a long evening. And when Buster opens his detective agency, he has no idea his first job will involve Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur: The Perfect Game/D.W.'s Furry Freakout
programme.desc: Francine is excited about a school project, but she's so obsessed with making it perfect that she can't seem to get anything done at all. When D.W. finds a stray kitten, it soon turns out to be a lot more than D.W. can handle.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Time Trouble/Buster's Amish Mismatch
programme.desc: D.W. is tired of being bossed around all the time and demands to know why she couldn't have been born before Arthur! And during a trip to Amish country, Buster becomes enamored with the simple life and vows to forgo modern conveniences.

programme.title: Arthur: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard saw extensive action throughout the Second World War, battling U-boats within sight of mainland America.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Last Flight of the B-17
programme.desc: Twenty-six metres beneath the waves at the foot of the majestic Calvi Citadel in Corsica lies an American plane from the Second World War.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: Secret Bunkers of Omaha Beach
programme.desc: On June 6th 1944, Lieutenant-colonel Rudder’s Rangers company climbs the cliffs of the Pointe du Hoc in Normandy with the mission to destroy the German cannons.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Tragic Sinking of Leopoldville
programme.desc: On the 24th of December 1944, 2 237 American soldiers of the 66th Infantry Division are aboard the Steamer Léopoldville.

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury
programme.desc: On September 1, 1939, Germany’s invasion of Poland throws the world into war. No longer a European affair, the conflict spreads: in the Pacific, Japan - at war with China since 1937 - accelerates its imperial ambitions.

programme.title: Hitler & Churchill: The Eagle & The Lion
programme.desc: The Old Lion vs. the German Eagle. This clash of titans waged at the highest level of power dominated the last century. And leads us to posit a chilling contingency to history: what would Europe be now had the players been different?

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Ceausescu, led his country to ruin. His magnum opus: Casa Popurlui, a monument to his megalomania and the world’s heaviest administrative building. But could the rumors of an underground nuclear bunker connected to a city-wide tunnel network be true?

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Democracy without Democrats 1929-1933
programme.desc: Democracy Without Democrats 1929-1933: A protest turns into a racist and anti-Jewish movement during the 1920s and the NSDAP use emotions to gain the loyalty of the people.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The Battle of Leyte Gulf tells the story of the largest sea conflict in history involving Pearl Harbor warships and the largest battleships in the world, and how the US Navy, despite kamikaze attacks and a Japanese decoy fleet, were victorious.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: The surrounding waters of Australia conceal a community of vicious predators.

programme.title: Secrets Of Wild Australia
programme.desc: These formidable predators predate dinosaurs, and they continue to thrive.

programme.title: Arabian Inferno
programme.desc: Sidle up to a desert wadi, where water gives life and predators wait to take it.

programme.title: Arabian Inferno

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo is Missing

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy

programme.desc: Vincent and Cat search for Liam using clues about a mysterious Patient X. JT and Tess investigate whether JT is finally free of the experimental serum. Nicole Gale Anderson also stars.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Rebel
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sal Mineo guest stars as a ruthless young operator who heads up an international narcotics ring which the IMF attempts to break up on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: My Friend, My Enemy
programme.desc: Special-guest star Jill Haworth portrays a glamorous double agent, who uses her feminine wiles on Paris to set him up for an enemy plot on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Innocent
programme.desc: Christopher Connelly guest stars as a non-cooperative young computer genius who has "dropped out" of society, but is desperately needed by the IMF to complete their assignment on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Whittier gets ugly when a buyer named Big Dave tries to take it all. After some tough losses, the guys win a state of the art food truck and an off-road rock crawler with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing Ghosts In
programme.desc: Learn what happens when ghosts from eras past cross into our realm.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Terrifying Visions
programme.desc: Meet a teen attacked by a ghost, and another who contacts a paranormal being.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Voices of the Dead
programme.desc: Hear what true horror really sounds like when the dead speak to the living.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror
programme.desc: New owners of the Wheatsheaf Pub find bits of clothing and bones behind the walls.

programme.title: A Haunting: Back From The Grave
programme.desc: Stay-at-home-mom Jamie enjoys taking walks with her children through her historic North Carolina neighborhood, until "something" dark and sinister follows them home. Jamie soon finds her son directly communicating with an entity from "beyond the grave."

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives grill the wife of a man found shot dead on his Iowa farm after they discover she had an affair with one of his friends. Can they pressurise the pair to tell the truth?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: New. Two Fires, One Victim: When a young woman's body is found in the woods, investigators follow a trail of fire, fury and falsities to uncover what happened to her. (S3, ep 12)

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance. Detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: ANCIENT MEGASTRUCTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PEOPLE WITHOUT IDENTITY
programme.desc: 10 Mysterious Figures: Individuals who emerged from obscurity, made their mark on history, then vanished without a trace. Their identities remain unconfirmed, shrouding them in mystery.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: An ambitious young scientist is sent on a quest by Himmler to find the lost people of Atlantis; it becomes an expedition filled with mountain madness, lost integrity and political intrigue.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of Hiram Bingham's amazing discovery of one of the great wonders of the modern world, Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Bermondsey Horror
programme.desc: In 1849, a man suddenly disappeared in Bermondsey. The discovery that he had been brutally murdered enraptured the press and the public. Even Charles Dickens was totally engrossed in the story of the sinister Marie Manning.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1911, a gun battle on the streets of London, The Siege of Sidney Street the first breaking-news story in history.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Schapbo
programme.desc: John Rambo’s ability to decimate enemies all by himself has created some of the most incredible weapon stunts in Hollywood history.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Meet the Smiths
programme.desc: Terry finally gets to compare himself to Brad Pitt!! Terry and Larry test 3 scenes from action film Mr. and Mrs. Smith.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: Tower Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell uncovers the extraordinary story of Tower Bridge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Britannia Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell recounts the story of the Britannia Bridge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Clifton Suspension Bridge
programme.desc: The story of Brunel's famous bridge over the Avon gorge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Humber Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell tells the story of the Humber Bridge.

programme.title: Concorde: Part One
programme.desc: How Concorde became the world's only supersonic airliner.

programme.title: Concorde: Part Two
programme.desc: By the early 1980s, Concorde was admired the world over.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One

programme.title: Arthur: Double Tibble Trouble/Arthur's Almost Live Not Real Music Festival

programme.title: Arthur: The Last of Mary Moo Cow/Bitzi's Beau
